description_long: This house features a modern industrial design with a flat roof and large, grid-style windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The structure is composed of multiple rectangular volumes, some of which are offset to create visual interest and functional outdoor terraces. The exterior is predominantly white with black window frames, and the main entryway is marked by a double-height glass door. The interior, visible through the windows, includes open-plan living spaces with contemporary furnishings and minimalistic decor. The building sits on a raised platform supported by columns, and the roof sections are mostly flat, with one area covered in a gray material. The overall aesthetic is clean, geometric, and urban, suitable for a city neighborhood.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large grid windows, white exterior walls, and black accents, featuring open-plan interiors and outdoor terraces. The design is geometric and industrial, with a raised platform and visible support columns.
description_view_0: This view highlights the double-height windows and the main entryway, as well as the raised platform supported by columns.
description_view_1: This angle shows the open-plan interior with visible furnishings and a large terrace area, along with the flat roof section.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals additional terraces, a large central window, and the overall geometric layout of the house volumes.
description_view_3: This side view displays the extensive window arrangement, interior spaces, and the offset volumes creating outdoor areas.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large grid-style windows
attribute_entryway_design: Double-height glass door with black frame, no porch, minimal overhang, and clean geometric lines
